# Mini-AGI

> Mini-AGI is a Kazakhstan-first working context layer for teams: incoming work signals become decisions, tasks, and project memory with human review before final actions.

Canonical site: https://nurgisa-labs.github.io/Mini-AGI
Languages: Kazakh, Russian, and English
Primary market: Kazakhstan
Last updated: 2026-07-14

## Core positioning

Mini-AGI helps teams stop losing decisions across meetings, files, links, documents, tasks, and Telegram/WhatsApp-style incoming work. The public landing intentionally keeps the accepted dark terminal/CLI direction and adds a cool-neutral light mode, with low text and no generic SaaS dashboard. The current promise is a practical 7-day pilot around one real work stream, not a generic AI chatbot page.

1. Capture an incoming signal.
2. Link it to project context, people, prior decisions, and constraints.
3. Prepare a draft note, task, answer, or next step.
4. Mark sources and risks before external action.
5. Keep human review for clients, money, publication, legal, and final decisions.
6. Save confirmed decisions back into project memory.

## Target audience

- Founders and operators in Kazakhstan.
- Teams that run work through meetings, documents, tasks, and messengers.
- Tender/document-heavy teams.
- Client service and internal operations teams.
- Engineering/product teams that need source-grounded memory and review gates.

## Important topics

- Mini-AGI
- рабочий контур с ИИ
- жобалық жад
- project memory
- Telegram/WhatsApp incoming work
- agent drafts
- source checking
- human review
- decisions → memory

## Pages

- `/Mini-AGI/` — Russian main landing page.
- `/Mini-AGI/contact/` — Russian contact fallback page.
- `/Mini-AGI/ru/` — Russian main landing page.
- `/Mini-AGI/ru/contact/` — Russian contact fallback page.
- `/Mini-AGI/kz/` — Kazakh main landing page.
- `/Mini-AGI/kz/contact/` — Kazakh contact fallback page.
- `/Mini-AGI/en/` — English main landing page.
- `/Mini-AGI/en/contact/` — English contact fallback page.
- `/Mini-AGI/blog/` — Russian Mini-AGI notes index.
- `/Mini-AGI/blog/kuda-ukhodyat-resheniya-posle-vstrech/` — practical article on keeping meeting decisions in the working loop.

## What Mini-AGI is not

Mini-AGI is not marketed as a fully autonomous replacement for specialists. Agents prepare context-aware work; people review, approve, and own final decisions.

## Contact

Primary Telegram: https://t.me/nurgisa_andasbekov (`@nurgisa_andasbekov`). If the link does not open, search for the handle in Telegram and send the short process description from the contact page.
